g.text: This workflow was built with KNIME Analytics Platform 4.0.2, however,
similar workflows have been used with KNIME Analytics Platform 3.5 to 4.1
The sample images and pixel classification model are packaged with this
workflow already, but can also be downloaded from https://doi.org/
1) Follow instructions at https://knime.com/community/imagej to install the
nightly-build to add and activate the nightly software site of KNIME Image
If a model is available directly, use the
Model Reader node instead of re-training
if you run out of memory
